description: 7-day time grid composing day-view-style columns in a semantic table

attributes.name: data-start-date
attributes.description: ISO date for the first day of the week (e.g., 2026-04-06)

attributes.name: data-days
attributes.description: Number of day columns (e.g., 5 for workweek)

attributes.name: data-start-hour
attributes.description: First visible hour (0-23), or 'auto' to scan events

attributes.name: data-end-hour
attributes.description: Last visible hour (0-23). Ignored when data-start-hour is 'auto'.

events.name: week-view:event-click
events.description: Fired when a calendar-event is clicked
events.detail: { date, time, text, element, category, duration }

structure.description: Day/hour cell containing hour-view and calendar-event elements
Subgrid container for events within a cell
Individual event with time, category, and optional duration

childAttributes.name: data-date
childAttributes.description: ISO date assigning this event to a day column (auto mode)
